LanguageData.VQE_FirefighterDrone.label: firefighter drone
LanguageData.VQE_FirefighterDrone.description: An automated utility drone equipped with fire suppression systems. It continuously patrols the area, automatically extinguishing small fires it encounters. If a fire escalates beyond its capability, the drone initiates a self-destruct sequence, detonating in a powerful burst of firefoam.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. They require connection to a powered drone transmitter to function.
LanguageData.VQE_FirefighterDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
